problem id: bf98d26a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  00010100 -> 10000101
  10110000 -> 00101100
  10001111 -> 00000011
  10000000 -> 00100000
  11010011 -> 10010100
  10110111 -> 00001101
  01011000 -> 00010110
  00101001 -> 01101010
  01100011 -> 10111000

query: 10111000
predicted answer: 00101110
